data.title: Draganfly to showcase drone systems at AUSA 2025 in Washington, DC from Oct. 13-15. Exhibiting in booth #943 with partner, Defense Prime Global Ordnance.
data.description: On October 10, 2025, Draganfly Inc., a prominent player in advanced unmanned systems and integrated drone solutions, disclosed its involvement at the Association of the U.S. Army (AUSA) Annual Meeting & Exposition scheduled from October 13-15, 2025. The company will have a booth (#943) at the event, partnering with Defense Prime Global Ordnance to showcase their innovative drone platforms, sensor systems, and mission-focused technologies to attendees. Draganfly is listed on NASDAQ (DPRO), CSE (DPRO), and FSE (3U8A).

data.title: Unikraft launches $6M for AI-driven cloud platform, aiming for new efficiencies in scale and cost.
data.description: San Francisco-based Unikraft has officially released its cutting-edge cloud platform, Unikraft Cloud, tailor-made for supporting intricate AI-driven cloud workloads with lightning-fast millisecond responsiveness. In a recent development, the company successfully secured a $6 million seed funding round, primarily backed by Heavybit. Other significant contributors include Vercel Ventures, Mango Capital, Firestreak, Fly VC, First Momentum Ventures, as well as a consortium of strategic angel investors. Notably, this investment round signifies Vercel Ventures' initial participation in Unikraft's growth journey.

data.title: Religious persecution in Korea persists with 82-year-old Dr. Hak Ja Han indicted and detained.
data.description: In Seoul on October 10, 2025, an ongoing issue of religious persecution in Korea prevails as Dr. Hak Ja Han, an 82-year-old figure known as the Mother of Peace, was indicted and remains in detention. This incident adds to a series of legal actions indicating that religious persecution transcends individual leaders.

data.title: FB Financial (NYSE: FBK) to report Q3 earnings of $0.96/share, revenue expected at $167.75M, compared to $89.52M last year. CFO and COO roles filled. Stock fell 1.8% to $58.13.
data.description: FB Financial Corporation (NYSE: FBK) is set to announce its third-quarter earnings before the market opens on Tuesday, October 14. Analysts are anticipating quarterly earnings of 96 cents per share, a rise from 86 cents per share reported in the same period last year. Revenue for the quarter is projected to be $167.75 million, representing an increase from $89.52 million in the previous year. Michael Mettee was recently promoted to the CFO and COO position on September 24. Following the updates, FB Financial's stock saw a 1.8% decline, closing at $58.13 on Thursday. For more details and the full story, readers can refer to the latest analyst ratings available on Benzinga's Analyst Stock Ratings page, where stocks can be sorted by ticker, company name, analyst firm, and rating preference.

data.title: Six Flags reveals new changes in corporate governance structure.
data.description: Recently, a report highlighted that the global economy is estimated to contract by around 4.4% this year due to the ongoing pandemic. This projection indicates a slight improvement compared to the 4.6% decline forecasted in June. However, the recovery is expected to be uneven across countries, with advanced economies facing a 5.8% decline while emerging markets and developing economies are projected to experience a 3.3% contraction. Despite the overall economic downturn, there are signs of improvement in certain regions, with China predicted to grow by 1.9% this year, the only major economy set to see positive growth in 2020. The report also underscores the importance of fiscal and monetary policy support to aid in the global economic recovery.

data.title: Insulet Corporation will host Investor Day on Nov 20, 2025 at its Acton headquarters, presenting strategic priorities.
data.description: Acton, Massachusetts - Insulet Corporation (NASDAQ: PODD), a leading global provider of tubeless insulin pump technology under the Omnipod® brand, will organize an Investor Day at its Acton headquarters on November 20, 2025. This event will feature presentations by the management team focusing on the Company's future strategic goals, market potential, innovation plans, and long-term objectives. This initiative aims to provide investors with insights into Insulet's vision and direction.

data.title: Upbound Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: UPBD) to report Q3 2025 financial results on October 30, 2025, followed by a conference call.
data.description: Plano, Texas-based Upbound Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: UPBD) will disclose its third-quarter financial performance on October 30, 2025, before the market opens. This follows the company's commitment to offering financial services tailored to underserved consumers' changing needs and goals. A conference call discussing the results will commence at 9:00 a.m. ET on the same day. Those interested can join the call to follow the live updates.

data.title: Silver Storm secures US$7.0M financing deal with Samsung C&T to re-launch La Parrilla Silver Mine Complex.
data.description: In Toronto, Silver Storm has signed a deal with Samsung C&T for a US$7.0 million offtake financing agreement. This funding will be used for the reopening of the La Parrilla Silver Mine Complex.

data.title: Thunderstruck Ag's Razors Edge Concaves named to TIME's Best Inventions of 2025 list.
data.description: In WINKLER, Canada, Thunderstruck Ag's groundbreaking Razors Edge Concaves have recently been recognized for their innovation by being included in TIME’s prestigious list of the Best Inventions of 2025. This accolade highlights the exceptional quality of Thunderstruck Ag's product and positions it among the most noteworthy advancements of the year. This recognition serves as a testament to the dedication and success of Thunderstruck Ag in the agricultural sector.

data.title: Weekly recap of 12 consumer press releases: Chipotle's "Chip-or-Treat", NIVEA's #SkinLikeVelour campaign, Instacart's $0 delivery for United Airlines' Mileage Plus members.
data.description: This week, notable consumer and retail updates were highlighted on PR Newswire, such as Chipotle unveiling their "Chip-or-Treat" promotion. NIVEA also launched the #SkinLikeVelour campaign in collaboration with Juicy Couture. Furthermore, Instacart made headlines by announcing that United Airlines' Mileage Plus members can now enjoy free delivery services, displaying the continuous innovation within the industry. These updates showcase the evolving strategies of companies aimed at engaging consumers, with an aim to improve customer satisfaction and loyalty. Such initiatives contribute to shaping the retail landscape, catering to the diverse needs and preferences of consumers.

data.title: KKR finalizes purchase of OSTTRA from S&P Global and CME Group, with a deal worth $3.1 billion. Joint venture established in 2021.
data.description: KKR, a prominent global investment firm, has finalized the acquisition of OSTTRA, a top provider of post-trade solutions for the worldwide OTC market, from S&P Global and CME Group. The deal for OSTTRA amounted to a total enterprise value of $3.1 billion. OSTTRA, originally established in 2021 as a collaborative effort between CME Group and S&P Global, caters to the global financial industry with a wide range of services.

data.title: Seer’s Proteograph Suite enhances precision medicine with protein biomarkers at ASHG 2025, advancing multi-omic studies.
data.description: Scientific presentations have highlighted the crucial role of Seer's Proteograph Product Suite in multi-omic translational research. This suite facilitates the profiling of protein isoform-specific biomarkers, aiding in in-depth analysis. The presentations emphasized how Seer’s Proteograph Product Suite has become integral for such studies.
